    executeFill(Long, ExecutionFillRequestDTO) - Method in interface com.wealthpro.orderexecution.service.OrderService
    Record an execution fill and auto-update order status (PARTIALLY_FILLED or FILLED based on cumulative fill quantity).
    executeFill(Long, ExecutionFillRequestDTO) - Method in class com.wealthpro.orderexecution.service.OrderServiceImpl
    Record an execution fill and auto-update order status (PARTIALLY_FILLED or FILLED based on cumulative fill quantity).

    H

    handleGenericException(Exception) - Method in class com.wealthpro.orderexecution.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler
    Fallback handler for all other uncaught exceptions.
    handleIllegalStateException(IllegalStateException) - Method in class com.wealthpro.orderexecution.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler
    Handles invalid state transitions (e.g. cancelling a FILLED order).
    handleResourceAlreadyExistsException(ResourceAlreadyExistsException) - Method in class com.wealthpro.orderexecution.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler
    Handles resource-already-exists / conflict scenarios.
    handleResourceNotFoundException(ResourceNotFoundException) - Method in class com.wealthpro.orderexecution.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler
    Handles resource-not-found scenarios.
    handleValidationExceptions(MethodArgumentNotValidException) - Method in class com.wealthpro.orderexecution.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler
    Handles Bean Validation failures from @Valid annotations.

    OrderService - Interface in com.wealthpro.orderexecution.service
    Service interface defining all business operations for the Order domain.
    OrderServiceImpl - Class in com.wealthpro.orderexecution.service
    Implementation of OrderService containing the core business logic for the complete order lifecycle — from placement through pre-trade validation, routing, execution, allocation, and cancellation.
